narrative:
East (precinct in Carroll County) has 450 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.9 percentage points.
